key_facts: Founded January 4, 2019 in Wuxi, Jiangsu — independent energy storage system integrator
Not a subsidiary of any panel or inverter manufacturer
Revenue: CNY 142M (2022) → CNY 2.057B (2025) — approximately 15x in 3 years
Listed on HKEX main board (2655.HK) December 2025
Ranked among top-10 global energy storage system suppliers in 2024 (3% market share by new installed capacity)
Integrates large-scale, C&I, and residential BESS solutions
AI-powered platform: Guoxia AI + HANCHU (汉初) AI assistant
Cell suppliers: CALB and others (independent integrator, not manufacturer)
Strategy: AI-driven energy management as differentiator vs pure-play hardware BESS

funding_history.notes: 1,800x oversubscribed — record for China BESS IPOs; demonstrates HKEX enthusiasm for AI-enabled energy storage integrators

business_model_notes: Independent BESS system integrator: aggregates battery cells from tier-1 suppliers (CALB etc.), designs and installs large-scale, C&I, and residential energy storage systems. Value-add: Guoxia AI platform and HANCHU AI assistant for intelligent energy dispatch (optimize charge/discharge against electricity spot prices), predictive maintenance, and grid services. Revenue: hardware+integration margin + recurring AI platform subscription. AI-pivot strategy: avoid commoditization race-to-bottom in BESS hardware by providing software layer that justifies price premium.
competitive_position: Fastest-growing independent BESS integrator in China. 15x revenue growth in 3 years achieved without being an incumbent cell manufacturer (unlike BYD, CATL). 1,800x IPO oversubscription demonstrates exceptional investor demand for the 'AI-enabled BESS integrator' narrative. Main threat: BYD, Sungrow, and CATL are vertically integrated and can undercut on hardware cost. Guoxia's AI moat needs to be demonstrably superior for customers to pay premium.
research_notes: Highest confidence (★5). HKEX prospectus (2655.HK) is public record. Revenue trajectory confirmed via prospectus financial statements. 1,800x oversubscription from energy-storage.news and Bamboo Works reporting. Baike.baidu.com confirmed Wuxi founding details. Market share figure (3%) from prospectus citing third-party market research.
